# `library_codex.data_structure.FenwickTree`

1D/動的/2D Fenwick・range add/range sum。

- 計算量の目安: 更新・取得 $O(\log N)$、2D $O(\log H\log W)$
- source: [`data_structure/FenwickTree.py`](../../../data_structure/FenwickTree.py)
- 公開API: function 0、class 4、method/property 17（Python protocol 1を含む）

## Import

```python
from library_codex.data_structure.FenwickTree import FenwickTree, RangeAddRangeSum, DynamicFenwickTree, FenwickTree2D
```
